segments.text: From Young Link's perspective, what are the areas where Young Link can actually compete against Snake in this matchup?
segments.original_text: この対面実際ヤングリンク側としてはどういうところをスネークに対していける部分になってきますか?

full_text: From Young Link's perspective, what are the areas where Young Link can actually compete against Snake in this matchup?
